issues.description: Function comment is stale and still describes the old 3-tier system ('Small diffs get haiku/300s/1 iter; medium get sonnet/900s/2; large get sonnet/1800s/2.'). Must be updated to document the new four-tier thresholds: <20→haiku/300s/1, 20-50→haiku/600s/1, 50-200→sonnet/900s/2, >200→sonnet/1800s/2.

No BATS tests exist for get_pr_review_config(). AC3 requires verification that diffs 20-50 lines use haiku/600s/1 iter, and AC4 requires new tests covering the changes. Four boundary-case tests must be added covering all four tiers: <20, 20-49, 50-199, and >=200 lines.
